2604.21724.title: Beyond N-gram: Data-Aware X-GRAM Extraction for Efficient Embedding Parameter Scaling
2604.21724.paper_summary: Large token-indexed lookup tables provide a compute-decoupled scaling path, but their practical gains are often limited by poor parameter efficiency and rapid memory growth. We attribute these limitations to Zipfian under-training of the long tail, heterogeneous demand across layers, and "slot collapse" that produces redundant embeddings. To address this, we propose X-GRAM, a frequency-aware dynamic token-injection framework. X-GRAM employs hybrid hashing and alias mixing to compress the tail while preserving head capacity, and refines retrieved vectors via normalized SwiGLU ShortConv to extract diverse local n-gram features. These signals are integrated into attention value streams and inter-layer residuals using depth-aware gating, effectively aligning static memory with dynamic context. This design introduces a memory-centric scaling axis that decouples model capacity from FLOPs. Extensive evaluations at the 0.73B and 1.15B scales show that X-GRAM improves average accuracy by as much as 4.4 points over the vanilla backbone and 3.2 points over strong retrieval baselines, while using substantially smaller tables in the 50% configuration. Overall, by decoupling capacity from compute through efficient memory management, X-GRAM offers a scalable and practical paradigm for future memory-augmented architectures. Code aviliable in https://github.com/Longyichen/X-gram.
2604.21724.paper_summary_zh: 大型的標記索引查找表提供了一條計算解耦的擴展路徑，但它們的實際收益通常受到參數效率低下和內存快速增長的限制。<lb/>我們將這些限制歸因於長尾的 Zipfian 欠訓練、各層之間的需求異質性，以及產生冗餘嵌入的「槽崩潰」。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 X-GRAM，一種頻率感知的動態標記注入框架。<lb/>X-GRAM 採用混合哈希和別名混合來壓縮尾部，同時保留頭部容量，並通過標準化的 SwiGLU ShortConv 來精煉檢索的向量，以提取多樣的本地 n-gram 特徵。<lb/>這些信號通過深度感知閘控整合到注意力值流和層間殘差中，有效地將靜態內存與動態上下文對齊。<lb/>這種設計引入了一個以內存為中心的擴展軸，將模型容量與 FLOPs 解耦。<lb/>在 0.73B 和 1.15B 的規模下，廣泛的評估顯示 X-GRAM 在平均準確率上比原始骨幹提高了多達 4.4 分，比強檢索基準提高了 3.2 分，同時在 50% 配置中使用了顯著更小的表。<lb/>總體而言，通過高效的內存管理將容量與計算解耦，X-GRAM 為未來的內存增強架構提供了一種可擴展且實用的範式。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/Longyichen/X-gram 獲得。
2604.21724.author: Yilong Chen et.al.
2604.21724.authors: Yilong Chen, Yanxi Xie, Zitian Gao, He Xin, Yihao Xiao, Renbiao Liu, Haoming Luo, Yifan Luo, Zhengmao Ye, Tingwen Liu, Xin Zhao, Ran Tao, Bryan Dai
